violations.text: Deli meat and cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Various food and dessert products packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment must label all food in retail area. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2025
The condensate from the air conditioner was draining into the handwashing sink. Hand sinks are designated for hand washing only. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese, drinks) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

Fruit salad was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

Deli meats were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of PIC, rice was placed hot in the refrigerator in COVERED containers. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

Salads are packaged in the food establishment are lacking COMPLETE labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the retail area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024
Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
Soap and paper towel dispenser observed above mop sink. Handwashing aids and devices cannot be at sinks other than hand washing sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2024
The prep sink is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
The floor in the mop sink area does not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
The doorway in the ware-washing area is in poor repair. Observed exposed sheet rock. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
The floor in the ware-washing area is in poor repair. Observed improper seal with exposed concrete. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2024
